name: PXDesign
description: Designs de novo protein binders targeting specified proteins. Combines a diffusion generator with Protenix and AF2-IG confidence models for selection. Achieved 17-82% nanomolar hits across seven benchmark targets.
capabilities: Designs de novo protein binders targeting specified proteins
Combines a diffusion generator with Protenix and AF2-IG confidence models for selection
Achieved 17-82% nanomolar hits across seven benchmark targets

pdbFile.description: Target protein structure in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

hotspots.description: Target residues to focus binder design on

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed binder

numDesigns.description: Number of binder designs to generate
